title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXIV. Jingles.
content:
Hey, dorolot, dorolot!
            Hey, dorolay, dorolay!
        Hey, my bonny boat, bonny boat,
            Hey, drag away, drag away!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXIV. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
